note: Player names ARE available via the 'players' collection which maps player_id to full_name, country, and other info. The backend automatically enriches query results with player names before formatting.

players.description: Player identity information — maps player_id to name and country.

fields.player_id: Unique numeric player identifier (ESPN Cricinfo ID)

players_yearly.description: Player career statistics aggregated per year and format. No player names — only player_id.

fields.player_id: Unique numeric player identifier (ESPN Cricinfo ID)
fields.highest_score: Highest score in an innings (string, e.g. '41*' means not out)
fields.best_bowling: Best bowling figures in an innings (string, e.g. '5/44')
fields.ave_diff: Difference between batting and bowling average

players_matches.description: Player statistics for each individual match. No player names — only player_id.

fields.player_id: Unique numeric player identifier (ESPN Cricinfo ID)
fields.innings: Innings number (1 or 2), or 0 for DNB (did not bat)
fields.not_out: Whether the player was not out: 'Not out', 'Out', or 'DNB'
fields.runs_str: Runs scored as string (may include '*' for not out, or 'DNB')
fields.ducks: 1 if the player scored 0 and was out, else 0
fields.bowling_strike_rate: Bowling strike rate for this match

team_matches.description: Team-level results and scores for each match innings.
